reason: This is a common Islamic prayer/supplication asking for guidance and spiritual connection. It contains no extremist content, violence, or ISIS-related themes.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Prayers and Supplications
Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: ربِي أعوذ بك من ذنب حرمني طريق العلم ، ولذة الصلاة ، واستمرار الطاعة ، وفرح الحياة ، وتدبر القرآن
